I need to remove the showcase page from this app. The App.tsx file is 5236 lines. I need you to make specific edits. DO NOT rewrite the entire file - use surgical Edit tool calls. ## Context - The app has pages: "home", "build-orders", and "showcase" (rendered inline in App.tsx) - The showcase flow is rendered in App.tsx inside a div with class "tab-content--showcase-flow" (around lines 3753-5231) - This showcase content is always in the DOM (hidden via display:none when not active) - The build order page works independently via BuildOrderPage.tsx -> BuildOrdersSection ## What to do (in order): ### 1. Remove the showcase JSX block from App.tsx Read lines 3745-5235 of /home/garrosh/repos/wc3-build-order-app/src/App.tsx to get the exact content. The showcase div starts at the line with: ```
``` And ends before the closing `
` tags at the end of the component. Remove the ENTIRE showcase div (from `

`), but keep everything else intact (the page routing logic before it and the closing tags after it). ### 2. Remove the "See Components" button from HomePage.tsx In /home/garrosh/repos/wc3-build-order-app/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, remove the EscOptionButton that navigates to "showcase" (lines 15-17). Keep the "See Builds" button. Since there's only one button left, you can simplify the actions prop. ### 3. Remove showcase-only imports from App.tsx Remove these imports from App.tsx since they're only used in the showcase flow: - ShowcaseSection imports (ButtonsSection, ControlsSection, ButtonShowcaseSection, ResourceCounterSection, CommandCardSection, UnitQueueSection, TooltipSection, PortraitFrameSection, BarsSection) - DesignTokensSection - AccessibilitySection - BundleSizeSection - FAQSection - FooterSection - BordersSection Keep these imports (used by the rest of App.tsx): - useState, useEffect, useRef from react - TimeIndicatorModel - TopHudWebGL - decodeBLP, getBLPImageData from war3-model - useCurrentRace, RACE_PREFIXES, setCurrentRace from race state - getCount from counter state - usePage, setPage from page state - Race type - GlueSmallButton - PAGE_REGISTRY from pages - LoadingScreen ### 4. Update pages/index.ts Remove the comment about "showcase" special page ID (lines 13-14). ### 5. After making all edits, run `npm run build` to verify nothing is broken. IMPORTANT: Read the file sections BEFORE editing to get exact strings. Use the Edit tool, not Write. Be very precise with string matching.
